name: ContactId
label: Contact ID
inlineHelpText:
Customer contact for this case who's email address is used for CAS survey.
For Escalated Cases this will be the person who receives the emails from Factory Support

label: System Billing Type
inlineHelpText: Select Billing Type

inlineHelpText: “City” part of the physical location address of Component SN

name: SVMXC__Component__c
label: Installed Product
inlineHelpText: Serial number of the component for which the customer is seeking support. Is a lookup to an existing installed product record in ServiceMax

name: SVMXC__Entitlement_Notes__c
label: Entitlement Notes
inlineHelpText: Additional information entered in Case during customer entitlement

name: SVMXC__Entitlement_Type__c
label: Entitlement Type
inlineHelpText: This is for internal use,  and this is set to 'Auto' by Auto-Entitlement or set to 'Interactive' in interactive entitlement.

name: SVMXC__Preferred_End_Time__c
label: Preferred End Time
inlineHelpText: End time for the case to be scheduled. Calculated automatically based on booking window selection.

name: SVMXC__Preferred_Start_Time__c
label: Preferred Start Time
inlineHelpText: Start time for the case to be scheduled. Calculated automatically based on booking window selection.

name: SVMXC__Product__c
label: Product
inlineHelpText: Choose or enter the Product name for which the customer is seeking support.

name: SVMXC__SLA_Terms__c
label: SLA Terms
inlineHelpText: Service Level the customer is entitled to by this contract. Is a lookup to an existing service level record.

name: SVMXC__Service_Contract__c
label: Service/Maintenance Contract
inlineHelpText: Name of the service contract. Is a lookup to an existing service contract in ServiceMax

name: SVMXC__Site__c
label: Location
inlineHelpText: The customer location where the contact is reporting the problem or the location of the installed product.

name: SVMXC__Top_Level__c
label: Product/System
inlineHelpText: Serial number of the top-level installed product to which the component belongs. Is a lookup to an existing installed product record in ServiceMax.

name: SVMXC__Warranty__c
label: Warranty
inlineHelpText: Product Warranty

name: SVMXC__Time_to_Initial_Response__c
label: Time to Initial Response (in Minutes)
inlineHelpText: Time taken to initial response as per commitment in SLA.

name: SVMXC__Time_to_Onsite_Response__c
label: Time to Onsite Response (in Minutes)
inlineHelpText: Time taken to onsite response as per commitment in SLA.

name: SVMXC__Time_to_Resolve__c
label: Time to Resolve (in Minutes)
inlineHelpText: Time taken to resolve as per commitment in SLA.

name: SVMXC__Time_to_Restore__c
label: Time to Restore (in Minutes)
inlineHelpText: Time taken to restore as per commitment in SLA.

name: SVMX_Case_Resolution__c
label: Case Resolution
inlineHelpText: How was the case resolved?

inlineHelpText: Risk of smoke/fire/electrical shock - if checked an email will be send to Quality Officer

inlineHelpText: Risk of sample damage or loss - if checked an email will be send to Quality Officer

name: SVMX_pMDR_5__c

inlineHelpText: Potential incorrect/delayed diagnosis - if checked an email will be send to Quality Officer

inlineHelpText: Allegation that labels/documents are inaccurate/missing - if checked an email will be send to Quality Officer

name: SVMX_pMDR_7__c
label: Performance not matching product claims
inlineHelpText: Allegation that functionalities/performance do not macht company claims - if checked an email will be send to Quality Officer

name: SVMX_pMDR_8__c
label: Potential regulatory issue
inlineHelpText: Allegation of failed ISO/FDA compliance - if checked an email will be send to Quality Officer

name: Subject_Translated__c

inlineHelpText: Disclaimer: This text has been translated by AI. Minor differences from the original may be present, but the overall intent and meaning remain unchanged.

name: Zinc_Conversation__c
label: Zinc Conversation
inlineHelpText: View this object's conversation in Zinc

name: Zinc_Message_Body__c
label: Zinc Message Body
calculatedFormula: "Please assist me on ServiceMax Case " & CaseNumber & " on product " & SVMXC__Product__r.Name & " with serial " & SVMX_Component_serial__c & " for customer '" & SVMXC__Site__r.Name & "'"

name: SVMXC__SM_Change_Order__c
label: Change Order
inlineHelpText: This field is used to associate the Case with Change Order.

name: SVMXC__SM_Is_FCO_Case__c
label: Is FCO Case
inlineHelpText: This field is used to indicate whether the Case is created from the Change Order process.

name: logmein__CCIL_Product2__c
label: CCIL Product2
calculatedFormula:
CASE( logmein__Product__c , 
"LogMeIn Free", "lmifree", 
"LogMeIn Pro", "lmipro", 
"LogMeIn Pro2", "lmipro2", 
"LogMeIn IT Reach", "lmiitreach", 
"LogMeIn Rescue", "lmirescue", 
"LogMeIn Backup", "lmibackup", 
"LogMeIn Hamachi", "lmihamachi", 
"LogMeIn Hamachi2", "lmihamachi2", 
"LogMeIn Ignition", "lmiignition", 
"RemotelyAnywhere", "remotelyanywhere", 
"Network Console", "networkconsole", 
"LogMeIn Rescue+Mobile", "lmirescuemobile", 
"LogMeIn Ignition for iPhone", "lmiignitioniphone", 
"LogMeIn Central", "lmicentral", "")

name: logmein__HourLastModified__c
label: HourLastModified
calculatedFormula: if((VALUE( MID(TEXT( LastModifiedDate), 12, 2) ) - 4) < 0, (VALUE( MID(TEXT( LastModifiedDate), 12, 2) )) - 4 + 24, (VALUE( MID(TEXT( LastModifiedDate), 12, 2) )) - 4 )

name: logmein__HourOpened__c
label: HourOpened
calculatedFormula: if((VALUE( MID(TEXT(  CreatedDate  ), 12, 2) ) - 4) < 0, (VALUE( MID(TEXT(  CreatedDate  ), 12, 2) )) - 4 + 24, (VALUE( MID(TEXT(  CreatedDate  ), 12, 2) )) - 4 )

name: logmein__Jira__c
label: JIRA URL
inlineHelpText: Add the URL to the JIRA ticket created for this Escalation.

name: logmein__Session_ID__c
label: Session ID
inlineHelpText: The session ID for the session that the tech creates.

name: logmein__To_Reproduce__c
label: To Reproduce
inlineHelpText: Enter a list of steps to reproduce the issue.  Be concise.

name: RescueCustomField4__c
label: RescueCustomField4
calculatedFormula:
CASE( SVMXC__Billing_Type__c  ,
"Billable", "External Customer - T&M Billable",
"Contract","External Customer - Contract",
"Warranty",	"External Customer - Warranty",
"Not Applicable"
)

name: TF_NLP__c
label: NLP
inlineHelpText: Results from Natural Language Processing

name: Case_Time_to_Respond__c
label: Case Time to Respond
calculatedFormula:
if(SVMX_pMDR_10__c == True ,
			IF(Now() - LastModifiedDate  < 14, '🟢',  '🔴'),
IF(floor(Days_Open__c) = 0, '🟢',
					IF(Floor(Days_Open__c) > 0 && Floor(Days_Open__c) < 3, '🟡','🔴')))
inlineHelpText:
Using LastModifiedDate  < 14 as 🟢 and not used in past 14 day as 🔴 for 'normal' cases and
 🟢 🟡 🔴 for 'queue owned cases' based on Days open.

name: Total_Activity_Time_minutes__c
label: Total Activity Time (minutes)
inlineHelpText: Calculated by default flow sunming the related Event duration

name: Service_Request__c
label: Service Request
inlineHelpText: Relation to Service Request
